# Example Project

> Example Project is a tool for building great software. This index covers all documentation.

## Getting Started

- [Installation](https://example.com/docs/install): How to install Example Project
- [Quick Start](https://example.com/docs/quickstart): Get up and running in 5 minutes

## API Reference

- [REST API](https://example.com/docs/api/rest): REST API reference
- [GraphQL API](https://example.com/docs/api/graphql): GraphQL API reference

## Optional

- [Changelog](https://example.com/docs/changelog): Release notes and changelog
